channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: External Affairs Minister Jaishankar's Diplomatic Tour to West Asia, US, and Belgium
item.description: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar is embarking on a diplomatic tour that includes visits to four West Asian countries—Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, and Oman—from July 5-10. The trip aims to strengthen ...

item.title: Iran holds mass funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei amid regional conflict
item.description: Tens of thousands of Iranians gathered in Tehran's Imam Khomeini Grand Mosalla to pay tribute to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, the supreme leader killed during the US-Israeli war on Iran. Mourners, dressed ...

item.title: US Presidents' Influence on NATO Expansion and Its Impact on Russia-Ukraine Relations
item.description: The article discusses how four U.S. presidents contributed to the decline of European NATO by prioritizing a proxy war against Russia, with significant consequences for Ukraine and Europe. UK Prime Mi...

item.title: Joey Chestnut defends hot dog eating contest title amid legal challenges
item.description: The Nathan’s Famous hot dog eating contest is set to resume this Saturday in Coney Island, New York, marking the United States' 250th birthday. Joey Chestnut, the 17-time men's champion with a record ...

item.title: Canadian Player Misses World Cup Knockout Game Due to Hamstring Injury
item.description: Canadian soccer player Jonathan Davies revealed that a lingering hamstring injury prevented him from participating in the World Cup knockout stage. The 31-year-old, who played a key role in Canada's h...

item.title: Call for Musoma Rural to Gain District Status
item.description: Professor Muhongo has urged the Tanzanian government to elevate Musoma Rural to district status, arguing that this administrative change would accelerate development in the region. The proposal comes ...

item.title: Vice Ganda reacts to Kathy and Pol's complex relationship
item.description: The article discusses Vice Ganda's reaction to the 'complicated' love story involving Kathy and Pol, which is a storyline from the TV show 'Everybody Sing.' The piece highlights how Vice Ganda express...

item.title: Guessing Breakfast Beverages Based on Travel in Europe
item.description: The article describes an interactive quiz that claims to predict your preferred breakfast beverage based on the countries you visit across Europe. The premise involves users imagining their travel iti...

item.title: Former Newcastle Mayor and KZN MEC Dr Mahlaba Dies in Road Accident
item.description: Dr Ntuthuko Mahlaba, former mayor of Newcastle and KZN MEC for Sport, Arts and Culture, died after being struck by a vehicle while jogging in Newcastle. The ANC described his death as a devastating lo...

item.title: Conservative pundit criticized for suggesting bombing Iranian Supreme Leader's funeral
item.description: Fox News host Mark Levin faced backlash from conservative critics for expressing disappointment that the Trump administration did not authorize a strike on the funeral of Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Kh...

item.title: Wimbledon 2026: Upsets and Seed Movements in Men's and Women's Draws
item.description: The Wimbledon 2026 tournament has seen several notable upsets as top seeds face early exits. French Open champion Mirra Andreeva, the women's fifth seed, was defeated by former Wimbledon champion Barb...

item.title: British tennis player Arthur Fery advances to Wimbledon fourth round after long match against Zizou Bergs
item.description: Britain’s Arthur Fery delivered an extraordinary performance at Wimbledon, overcoming a two-set deficit against Belgium’s Zizou Bergs in a five-set thriller that lasted four hours and 38 minutes. The ...

item.title: Ashwanth Valthapa's Cricket Journey and TNPL Auction Success
item.description: Ashwanth Valthapa, a 25-year-old mystery spinner from Tamil Nadu, has experienced a remarkable transformation in his cricketing career. Initially a wicketkeeper-batter, he shifted to spin bowling afte...

item.title: East Africa promotes Kiswahili through AI and innovation initiatives
item.description: The East African Community (EAC) is urging citizens to actively participate in advancing a new strategic direction led by the East African Kiswahili Commission (KAKAMA). This initiative focuses on lev...

item.title: Morocco Advances to World Cup Quarter-Finals with 3-0 Win Over Canada
item.description: Morocco secured a 3-0 victory against Canada in the FIFA World Cup 2026 last-16 match, advancing to the quarter-finals for the second consecutive time. Azzedine Ounahi scored twice, with the first goa...

item.title: Jeffrey Santos Rejects 477K Offer in 'Deal or No Deal' Contest
item.description: The news article discusses a segment from the Philippine television show 'Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal,' where contestant Jeffrey Santos faced a pivotal decision. During the episode, Santos was presented...

item.title: Parental frustration over school resourcing leads to rising workplace violence in ACT schools
item.description: Australian Education Union ACT branch secretary Patrick Judge reported a significant rise in occupational violence incidents involving parents and community members at ACT public schools. Data from 20...

item.title: Springboks Dominate England in Nations Championship Opener
item.description: The Springboks delivered a commanding performance against England in their Nations Championship opener, securing a 45-21 victory at Ellis Park. Despite losing key players Siya Kolisi and Eben Etzebeth...

item.title: Sam Larry Involved in Lagos Road Accident; Bouncer Killed
item.description: Nigerian music promoter and socialite Sam Larry was hospitalised following a severe road accident on Lagos-Calabar Coastal Road on July 4, 2026. The collision involved Larry's vehicle and a trailer, r...

item.title: France to Face Paraguay in FIFA World Cup Round of 16
item.description: The FIFA World Cup Round of 16 clash between France and Paraguay took place at the Philadelphia Stadium on July 4, 2026. France's coach Didier Deschamps made a tactical adjustment by replacing injured...
